hero.title:
Preserving Roots,
Connecting Generations
hero.subtitle: A platform helping you connect and preserve Vietnamese genealogy values, from roots to the future.

about.title: Gia Pha Viet: Preserving Roots - Connecting the Future
about.p1: Genealogy is not just a list of names, but a sacred flow of culture and morality. In the digital age, our mission is to transform yellowed pages into eternal heritage.
about.p2: Gia Pha Viet is designed based on traditional values, combined with modern data management technology to help every family preserve, connect, and pass on the clan's story.

demo.title: Smart Genealogy Diagram
demo.desc: Visualize multi-branch family trees, track direct lineage relationships and information of each member on one screen.
demo.point2: Attach biographies, portraits and original documents
demo.point3: Search by name, branch, area and timeline

auto.title: Automatic Genealogy Creation
auto.desc: Quickly import data from Excel files or fragmented information, the system automatically links them.

events.title: Event Management
events.desc: Remind of death anniversaries, holidays, and clan anniversaries via phone and email.

security.title: Security & Permissions
security.desc: Data is encrypted according to international standards, with detailed access permissions for each member.

events.title: Event & Holiday Management
events.desc: Keep track of festivals, death anniversaries and traditional rituals through a modern electronic system.
events.sampleEvent1: Death Anniversary of Nguyen Clan Ancestor

notifications.title: Automatic Notifications
notifications.desc: System automatically sends reminders via SMS, email and app for important occasions of each branch.

connection.title: Family Connection
connection.desc: Synchronize multiple generations, invite far-away members and update common schedules by branch.

rituals.title: Ritual Storage
rituals.desc: Create a repository of prayers, offerings and ritual guides for each holiday.

budget.title: Expense Requests
budget.desc: Manage logistics, budget and resources for clan events.

preservation.title: Heritage Digitization & Security
preservation.desc: Store genealogy according to modern digitization standards, preserve ancient documents and enhance secure access for each member of the clan.

cta.title: Ready to create a digital heritage for your clan?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of Vietnamese clans in the journey of sustainable root preservation.

benefits.title: Benefits of Preserving Genealogy
benefits.subtitle: “Trees have roots, water has a source. People have ancestors to become who they are.” A journey of spiritual connection between past, present, and future.

connection.title: Bloodline Connection
connection.desc: Track generation lines in an intuitive, transparent and easy-to-update space for the whole family.

preservation.title: Preserving Heritage
preservation.desc: Digitize ancient genealogy pages along with images, documents and traditional stories for sustainable preservation.

education.title: Traditional Education
education.desc: Storing family activities helps the younger generation understand their roots, continuing the family's mission and morality.

ai.title: AI Member Suggestions
ai.desc: Automatically suggest relationship connections based on name, generation and historical data of each branch.

security.title: Multi-layer Security
security.desc: Data is encrypted in multiple layers and strictly authenticated to each access right.

reminder.title: Automatic Anniversary Reminders
reminder.desc: Notifications are sent regularly according to the lunar calendar to the app, email and related members.

storage.title: Permanent Storage
storage.desc: All images, texts and documentary films are periodically backed up on cloud infrastructure.

guide.title: User Guide
guide.subtitle: Step by step exploring and managing Vietnamese genealogy

step1.title: Create Clan
step1.desc: The first step is to create an account and set the clan name. The system will create a private space for your clan.

step2.title: Add Members
step2.desc: Enter clan member information: name, birth date, relationship. You can add each person or import a list from an Excel file.

step3.title: Link Relationships
step3.desc: Define relationships between members: parents, spouses, siblings. The system automatically draws the genealogy diagram.

step4.title: Store Documents
step4.desc: Upload images, documents, videos of ancient genealogy. All files are encrypted and stored securely on the cloud.

step5.title: Invite Members
step5.desc: Send invitations to clan members so they can join and update their personal information.

step6.title: Manage Events
step6.desc: Set death anniversaries, festivals, clan events. Receive automatic notifications on important occasions.

v1.title: How to create a clan in 2 minutes

v2.title: Import data from Excel file
v2.desc: Add hundreds of members at once

v3.title: Manage access permissions
v3.desc: Control who can view or edit

faqs.q: Where can I start if I don't know all the family members?
faqs.a: You can absolutely start with the closest members like parents, siblings. Then, gradually add others as you have information.
All genealogy data is encrypted according to international standards (AES-256). Only authorized people can access it.

faqs.q: Can I import data from existing old genealogy?
faqs.a: Yes, you can upload Excel files or images of old genealogy. The system can help you convert to a digital format.

faqs.q: What do other members need to do to join?
faqs.a: They just need to receive the invitation email, register an account and log in. No special technical skills are required.

faqs.q: Can I delete or edit information?
faqs.a: Yes, but every edit will be recorded to preserve historical integrity. Clan administrators can manage permissions.
Currently, Gia Pha Viet is in a free beta phase. You can use all features at no cost.

support.title: Need Help?
support.desc: Our support team is always ready to answer any questions.

subscribe.title: Subscribe to News
subscribe.desc: To update the latest news, please enter your email.

notFound.title: 404 - Page Not Found
notFound.desc: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.
